# IL6 — Interleukin 6

## Example Genotype

No directly genotyped variants. Functional status inferred from biomarkers.

## Health Relevance

IL-6 is a pleiotropic cytokine involved in inflammation, immune response, and hematopoiesis.

- **IBS-D symptom modulation** — IL-6 levels correlate with symptom severity (E3)
- **SSRI response** — elevated IL-6 associated with reduced antidepressant efficacy (E3)

- [ ] Request IL-6 serum level measurement [priority:: medium] [context:: testing]
